Fix LUFS meter using wrong sample rate after resampling \(pyloudnorm
filter coefficients were baked at original rate, not output rate\).
Add missing ''reason'' field to FAILED error dicts for uniform CSV schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
